Class RedisChatMemoryRepository

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.ai.chat.memory.repository.redis.RedisChatMemoryRepository
All Implemented Interfaces:
ChatMemoryRepository, AdvancedRedisChatMemoryRepository
public final class RedisChatMemoryRepository extends Object implements ChatMemoryRepository, AdvancedRedisChatMemoryRepository
Redis implementation of ChatMemoryRepository using Redis (JSON + Query Engine). Stores chat messages as JSON documents and uses the Redis Query Engine for querying.
Author:
Brian Sam-Bodden, Yanming Zhou

      public void clear(String conversationId)

    • findConversationIds

      public List<String> findConversationIds()
      Finds all unique conversation IDs using Redis aggregation. This method is optimized to perform the deduplication on the Redis server side.
      Specified by:
      findConversationIds in interface ChatMemoryRepository
      Returns:
      a list of unique conversation IDs

    • findByConversationId

      public List<Message> findByConversationId(String conversationId)
      Finds all messages for a given conversation ID. Uses the configured maximum messages per conversation limit to avoid exceeding Redis limits.
      Specified by:
      findByConversationId in interface ChatMemoryRepository
      Parameters:
      conversationId - the conversation ID to find messages for
      Returns:
      a list of messages for the conversation

    • saveAll

      public void saveAll(String conversationId, List<Message> messages)
      Description copied from interface: ChatMemoryRepository
      Replaces all the existing messages for the given conversation ID with the provided messages.
      Specified by:
      saveAll in interface ChatMemoryRepository

    • deleteByConversationId

      public void deleteByConversationId(String conversationId)
      Specified by:
      deleteByConversationId in interface ChatMemoryRepository

      public String getIndexName()
      Gets the index name used by this RedisChatMemory instance.
      Returns:
      the index name

    • findByContent

      public List<AdvancedRedisChatMemoryRepository.MessageWithConversation> findByContent(String contentPattern, int limit)
      Description copied from interface: AdvancedRedisChatMemoryRepository
      Find messages by content across all conversations.
      Specified by:
      findByContent in interface AdvancedRedisChatMemoryRepository
      Parameters:
      contentPattern - The text pattern to search for in message content
      limit - Maximum number of results to return
      Returns:
      List of messages matching the pattern

    • findByType

      public List<AdvancedRedisChatMemoryRepository.MessageWithConversation> findByType(MessageType messageType, int limit)
      Description copied from interface: AdvancedRedisChatMemoryRepository
      Find messages by type across all conversations.
      Specified by:
      findByType in interface AdvancedRedisChatMemoryRepository
      Parameters:
      messageType - The message type to filter by
      limit - Maximum number of results to return
      Returns:
      List of messages of the specified type

    • findByTimeRange

      public List<AdvancedRedisChatMemoryRepository.MessageWithConversation> findByTimeRange(String conversationId, Instant fromTime, Instant toTime, int limit)
      Description copied from interface: AdvancedRedisChatMemoryRepository
      Find messages by timestamp range.
      Specified by:
      findByTimeRange in interface AdvancedRedisChatMemoryRepository
      Parameters:
      conversationId - Optional conversation ID to filter by (null for all conversations)
      fromTime - Start of time range (inclusive)
      toTime - End of time range (inclusive)
      limit - Maximum number of results to return
      Returns:
      List of messages within the time range

    • findByMetadata

      public List<AdvancedRedisChatMemoryRepository.MessageWithConversation> findByMetadata(String metadataKey, Object metadataValue, int limit)
      Description copied from interface: AdvancedRedisChatMemoryRepository
      Find messages with a specific metadata key-value pair.
      Specified by:
      findByMetadata in interface AdvancedRedisChatMemoryRepository
      Parameters:
      metadataKey - The metadata key to search for
      metadataValue - The metadata value to match
      limit - Maximum number of results to return
      Returns:
      List of messages with matching metadata

    • executeQuery

      public List<AdvancedRedisChatMemoryRepository.MessageWithConversation> executeQuery(String query, int limit)
      Description copied from interface: AdvancedRedisChatMemoryRepository
      Execute a custom query using Redis Search syntax.
      Specified by:
      executeQuery in interface AdvancedRedisChatMemoryRepository
      Parameters:
      query - The Redis Search query string
      limit - Maximum number of results to return
      Returns:
